/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -fPIC -march=armv9-a+sve2 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wvla -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -fstack-protector-strong -g -O0 -g3 -DDEBUG -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libama_cryptography.so.3 -o lib/libama_cryptography.so.3.1.0 CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_core.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_consttime.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_sha3.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_hkdf.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_ed25519.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_aes_gcm.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_cpuid.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_secure_memory.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/dispatch/ama_dispatch.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_sha3_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_kyber_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_dilithium_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_sphincs_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_aes_gcm_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_ed25519_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_chacha20poly1305_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/neon/ama_argon2_neon.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/sve2/ama_sha3_sve2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/sve2/ama_kyber_sve2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_platform_rand.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_sha256.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_hmac_sha256.c.o
